review_summary: Identity and style are consistent across rows 0-8, and the 16-direction loop reads correctly overall with only boundary-soft warnings at the top and near the four cardinal transitions.

directions.label: 000 up
directions.observed: frontal body with head tipped straight up
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: both arms, cheeks, eyes, and beard lobes are balanced around the sprite center with no clear left-right lead. Vertical evidence: pupils ride high under the brows and the nose-mouth-beard stack foreshortens downward, so it reads as up but remains borderline with neutral.

directions.label: 022.5 up-right
directions.observed: slight screen-right yaw plus upward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: the screen-right cheek, nose, and jaw project farther than screen-left. Vertical evidence: pupils sit high and the chin is lifted, giving a clear up-right read.

directions.label: 045 up-right
directions.observed: moderate screen-right yaw with clear upward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: face plane opens to screen-right and screen-left side recedes. Vertical evidence: gaze stays high and the underside of the jaw is more visible than in neutral.

directions.label: 067.5 up-right
directions.observed: strong screen-right yaw with a small remaining upward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: nose and beard project strongly to screen-right and the torso follows. Vertical evidence: the eyes still sit slightly high and the chin remains lifted, but it is close to pure right.

directions.label: 090 right
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: head and torso are side-on to screen-right with the face edge and nose projecting right and the opposite side hidden. Vertical evidence: head pitch is near neutral so this lands as the right cardinal.

directions.label: 112.5 down-right
directions.observed: screen-right yaw with slight downward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: rightward profile remains dominant. Vertical evidence: pupils sit lower and the chin begins to tuck, producing a clear down-right read.

directions.label: 135 down-right
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: the face still opens to screen-right. Vertical evidence: the brow lowers over the eyes and the head pitches down more clearly than at 112.5.

directions.label: 157.5 down-right
directions.observed: mostly frontal down pose with residual screen-right bias
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: the nose and right facial plane still favor screen-right. Vertical evidence: the crown enlarges and the eyes drop under the brow, but the pose sits close to pure down.

directions.label: 180 down
directions.observed: frontal body with head pitched straight down
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: shoulders, arms, and facial mass are centered with no lateral lead. Vertical evidence: the top of the head dominates, the eyes sit low, and the face is compressed downward, making the down cardinal clear.

directions.label: 202.5 down-left
directions.observed: slight screen-left yaw plus downward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: the screen-left cheek and nose lead while screen-right recedes. Vertical evidence: pupils remain low and the chin stays tucked, yielding down-left.

directions.label: 225 down-left
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: leftward face opening is obvious. Vertical evidence: lowered gaze and head pitch are stronger than at 202.5, so the quadrant is clear.

directions.label: 247.5 down-left
directions.observed: strong screen-left yaw with a small remaining downward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: nose, beard, and torso project to screen-left. Vertical evidence: the eyes still sit a bit low and the head is not fully level, but it is close to pure left.

directions.label: 270 left
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: head and torso are side-on to screen-left with the face edge projecting left and the opposite side hidden. Vertical evidence: pitch is essentially neutral, so this reads as the left cardinal.

directions.label: 292.5 up-left
directions.observed: screen-left yaw with slight upward tilt
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: leftward profile is clear. Vertical evidence: pupils rise and the chin lifts slightly, giving an up-left read.

directions.label: 315 up-left
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: left facial plane leads and screen-right recedes. Vertical evidence: eyes sit high and the jawline opens upward more than at 292.5.

directions.label: 337.5 up-left
directions.observed: mostly frontal up pose with residual screen-left bias
directions.reason: Horizontal evidence: a small leftward face lead remains. Vertical evidence: pupils are high and the chin is lifted, but the pose sits close to the 000 up boundary.

review_warnings: 000 up is readable as up but borderline because the frontal symmetry reduces left-right cueing.
067.5 up-right to 090 right slightly compresses the remaining upward pitch before the pure right cardinal.
157.5 down-right to 180 down slightly compresses the remaining rightward bias into a nearly frontal down pose.
247.5 down-left to 270 left slightly compresses the remaining downward pitch before the pure left cardinal.
337.5 up-left to 000 up slightly compresses the remaining leftward bias into a nearly symmetric up pose.
